slides.content:
# Helmet

Helmet helps secure Express apps by setting various HTTP headers (like X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, etc.).

```bash
npm install helmet
```

```javascript
const helmet = require('helmet');
app.use(helmet());
```

It's a collection of 14 smaller middleware functions; you can configure them individually.
